meta.title: Ambient Backgrounds Demo
meta.description: A demo of the Ambient Backgrounds plugin — add animated ambient blur backgrounds to any WordPress page.
meta.author: Tarek Zaher

options.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$content = getenv('CONTENT');
remove_all_filters('content_save_pre');
remove_all_filters('content_filtered_save_pre');
wp_insert_post([
	'post_title'   => 'Imagine the Possibilities',
	'post_content' => $content,
	'post_status'  => 'publish',
	'post_type'    => 'page',
	'post_name'    => 'imagine-the-possibilities',
]);

env.CONTENT:
Imagine the Possibilities

So many WordPress backgrounds are boring and bland.

But an overstimulating animation distracts from the real goals of your site.

Enter Ambient Backgrounds!

Now you can add a killer background to your WordPress site at the click of a button. You can even customize it to match your brand and taste.

Add it like any other block to your site and start transforming your backgrounds into something amazing!
